verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Be lifted up Be lifted up, As we bow down, Be lifted up.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let the heavens rejoice, Let the nations be glad, Let the whole earth tremble, For You are God. Come and worship the Lord In the beauty of holiness.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As we bow down, Be lifted up, As we bow down, Be lifted up.
